title: begonia quadrialata
intro: Begonia quadrialata, also known as the four-angled begonia or Begonia quatro-angula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as providing protection against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Begonia quadrialata are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
